title: She Couldn't Take It
writer: Oliver H.P. Garrett, Gene Towne, C. Graham Baker
actors: George Raft, Joan Bennett, Walter Connolly
plot: The wealthy Van Dyke family are constantly in the media for outrageous behavior, much to the frustration of patriarch Dan Van Dyke. His self-centered, bubble-headed wife has a fondness for foreign imports, including "pet projects"...
